info.name: Microsoft Azure AttestationManagementClient
info.description: Various APIs for managing resources in attestation service. This primarily encompasses per-provider management.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Get Providers Microsoft Attestation Operations

query.description: (Required) Client API version.  Current version is 2021-06-01-preview

request.description: Lists all of the available Azure attestation operations.

response.name: List all the operations.

query.description: (Required) Client API version.  Current version is 2021-06-01-preview

response.name: Error response describing why the operation failed.

query.description: (Required) Client API version.  Current version is 2021-06-01-preview

item.name: Microsoft Azure Get Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Attestation Attestationproviders Providername Privateendpointconnections Privateendpointconnectionname

variable.description: (Required) The name of the attestation provider.

request.description: Gets the specified private endpoint connection associated with the attestation provider.

response.name: OK -- Get the private endpoint connection properties successfully.
Error response describing why the operation failed.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Put Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Attestation Attestationproviders Providername Privateendpointconnections Privateendpointconnectionname

variable.description: (Required) The name of the attestation provider.

request.description: Update the state of specified private endpoint connection associated with the attestation provider.

response.name: OK -- Update the private endpoint connection properties successfully.
Error response describing why the operation failed.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Delete Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Attestation Attestationproviders Providername Privateendpointconnections Privateendpointconnectionname

variable.description: (Required) The name of the attestation provider.

request.description: Deletes the specified private endpoint connection associated with the attestation provider.

response.name: OK -- Delete the private endpoint connection successfully.
No Content -- The private endpoint connection does not exist.
Error response describing why the operation failed.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Get Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Attestation Attestationproviders Providername Privateendpointconnections

variable.description: (Required) The name of the attestation provider.

request.description: List all the private endpoint connections associated with the attestation provider.

response.name: OK -- Successfully retrieved private endpoint connections.
Error result from Attestation service

item.name: Microsoft Azure Get Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Attestation Attestationproviders Providername Privatelinkresources

variable.description: (Required) The name of the attestation provider.

request.description: Gets the private link resources supported for the attestation provider.

response.name: OK - Successfully retrieved private link resources.
Error response describing why the operation failed.
